cards.title: Sudden Tempest
cards.description: Lightning shears the mid-board — each player discards the lowest priority token unless they hold a garrison.

cards.title: Shifting Glyphs
cards.description: Objective values rotate clockwise; players may pivot one unit 3" after rolling off.
cards.flavor: The ground hums with geomantic static.

cards.title: Aetheric Shear
cards.description: Ranged attacks made from outside 12" treat cover as one step worse this round.
cards.flavor: The air sparkles; shots drag and twist.

cards.title: Feral Echoes
cards.description: The first charge declared each phase gains +1" to roll if it targets a unit on an objective.
cards.flavor: Howling winds memorise old charges and replay them.

cards.title: Brazen Onslaught
cards.description: Warscroll Command abilities cost 0 CP this hero phase, but each may only be used on a 3+ roll.
cards.flavor: Order surges, yet demands its toll in risk.

cards.title: Dustfall Mirage
cards.description: Units wholly within 6" of a terrain feature cannot be selected for strike-first effects this combat phase.
cards.flavor: Every silhouette doubles until the haze passes.
